description.en: Values are the result of evaluating the annotation expressions.

excerpt.es: Values are the result of evaluating the annotation expressions.
excerpt.en: Values are the result of evaluating the annotation expressions.

description.en: Special value used to signal that an annotate function is being evaluated in a special environment with fake globals. When passed this value, annotate functions should either return the same value as for the Format.VALUE format, or raise NotImplementedError to signal that they do not support execution in this environment. This format is only used internally and should not be passed to the functions in this module.
